product_overview: 34a Master is a web application to prepare users for the §34a GewO (IHK Sachkunde) exam with a structured learning plan, quizzes, and a conversion-optimized onboarding flow for social-media leads.
core_goals: Allow learners to track daily study targets and overall progress toward exam readiness
Provide a sequenced module list and practice path (introduction, practice, mock exam) for each exam topic
Enable users to take interactive quizzes and see accuracy and completion feedback
Convert social-media leads into registered users through a short, qualification-driven onboarding flow
Offer an exam selection workflow (mini, written, simulation) and present results with recommended next steps

features.name: Lernplan Dashboard
features.description: Central learning hub that visualizes progress, daily goals, and upcoming modules so users can prioritize daily study.
user_flows: Navigate to /lernplan -> See overall progress, daily goals, and upcoming modules -> Navigate to /learn to open a module -> Select a learning unit -> Navigate to /quiz -> Answer quiz questions -> Submit quiz -> Navigate to /lernplan -> See updated completion percentages and accuracy scores

Navigate to /lernplan -> See today's learning focus and suggested next step -> Navigate to /learn to follow the suggested unit -> Complete the unit's practice items -> Navigate back to /lernplan -> Observe progress increment

features.name: TikTok Onboarding
features.description: Conversion-optimized onboarding funnel that qualifies leads, shows social proof, and fast-tracks qualified users to registration and a personalized dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /tiktok -> Complete employment qualification questionnaire -> Review social proof and testimonials -> Choose to register -> Fill registration information and submit -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See a personalized initial dashboard view based on onboarding answers
Navigate to /tiktok -> Start registration -> Submit incomplete registration form -> See validation errors and guidance -> Correct form inputs and resubmit -> Navigate to /dashboard

features.name: Module List & Study
features.description: Browse structured learning modules, view module metadata, and enter practice or assessment flows to progress through the curriculum.
user_flows: Navigate to /learn -> Browse available modules and module summaries -> Select a module to open its overview -> Start practice by navigating to /quiz -> Answer practice questions -> Complete practice session -> Return to /learn -> See module progress updated
Navigate to /learn -> Filter or scan modules to find a topic -> Select a module -> Review its hierarchy (Introduction, Practice, Mock Exam) -> Begin the Introduction unit

features.name: Quiz & Exam Selection
features.description: Support interactive quizzes and exam selection, enabling users to pick an exam type and complete a timed or structured assessment with result feedback.
user_flows: Navigate to /exam -> Choose exam type (Mini, Written, Simulation) -> Start selected exam -> Navigate to /quiz -> Answer exam questions under the chosen exam format -> Submit exam -> See exam results and recommended next steps
Navigate to /quiz -> Begin a practice question set -> Answer each question -> Submit answers -> See score and accuracy metrics

features.name: Profile & Account
features.description: Authenticated user area to review and update account information and view subscription details.
user_flows: Sign in -> Navigate to /profile -> Review account and subscription details -> Update profile fields -> Save changes -> See updated profile reflected on /profile
Sign in -> Navigate to /profile -> Attempt to save invalid profile input -> See field-level validation errors -> Correct inputs and save successfully

routes.description: Detailed learning plan and module tracking
Specialized onboarding flow for TikTok leads

features.name: Lernplan Dashboard
features.description: Visualized learning progress and daily study targets

features.name: TikTok Onboarding
